title: nabalus nanus
intro: Nabalus nanus, also known as the dwarf ragwort, is a small perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nabalus nanus include treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues like bronchitis. The herbal preparations of Nabalus nanus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and roots, which are used to create teas or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
